name: zarq-crypto
description: Independent crypto risk intelligence: Trust Score ratings (A+ to F) for 198 tokens, Network Distress Detector (NDD) with 7 signals, structural collapse warnings (100% death recall, 98% precision OOS), crash probability, and pre-trade safety checks. Free API.
author: ZARQ

tools.name: crypto_safety_check
tools.description: Quick pre-trade safety validation for a crypto token (<100ms). Returns risk level, trust grade, NDD, crash probability, and active flags.

tools.name: crypto_rating
tools.description: Full Trust Score with 5-pillar breakdown (Security, Compliance, Maintenance, Popularity, Ecosystem). 198 tokens rated.

tools.name: crypto_ndd
tools.description: Network Distress Detector: 7 signals, 0-5 scale, trend classification, crash probability, HC Alert status.

tools.name: crypto_signals
tools.description: Active HC Alert and Bottlefish signals with SHA-256 hashes and running precision scoreboard.

tools.name: crypto_compare
tools.description: Head-to-head token comparison: Trust Score, NDD, risk level, and key differences.

tools.name: crypto_distress_watch
tools.description: All tokens with NDD < 2.0, sorted by distress severity. Watchlist of elevated crash risk.

tools.name: crypto_alerts
tools.description: Structural collapse/stress warnings. OOS validated: 113/113 deaths detected, 98% precision.

tools.name: crypto_ratings_bulk
tools.description: Bulk ratings for all 198 tokens. Trust Score, grade, and risk level.
